title: Flight Preparations
description: Tomorrow is the day. My flight to Japan takes off. Did I really pack everything?
content:
Flight Preparations Tomorrow is the day.
My flight to Japan takes off.
Did I really pack everything?
I still have the feeling that I forgot something.
I packed clothes, towels, sportswear, 12 deodorants (yes, they are important in Japan, since I have not seen any good deodorant there so far),
plug adapters, a power strip, my spare glasses, sunglasses, toothbrush, razor, laptop, Nintendo Switch, and even an umbrella.
Of course, I also have various documents with me, such as my visa.
Even so, I still feel like I forgot something…
I will probably only find out in Japan whether that is really true.
I am also a bit nervous now. Tomorrow at 4:30 a.m. I am heading to the airport.
The flight is scheduled to depart at 8:30 a.m. I will first fly to Amsterdam.
From there, my flight to Japan leaves at 1:45 p.m., and the flight is supposed to take a full 13 hours and 40 minutes…
My flight numbers are:
KL1752 HAM-AMS KL0861 AMS-NRT I hope everything goes smoothly.
